The classification of Borzicactus sepium reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Cactaceae family.

intro: Borzicactus sepium, also known as the "Mexican prickly pear," is a species of cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its vibrant green stems and vibrant flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties.
